name: Acapulco Baked Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. Set the pan in a preheated oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Distribute the melted butter evenly across the bottom of the pan.
4. Slightly beat eggs, milk, salt, and pepper together.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes or until the eggs begin to set.
7. Sprinkle with cheese and chiles.
8. Using a wide metal spatula, scrape the bottom of the pan several times to break up the mixture.
9. Continue baking, breaking up the mixture again several more times, for an additional 5 minutes or until desired doneness is reached.
10. Serve with tomato sauce, ketchup, or chili sauce if used, and garnish with sliced tomatoes.
